message:
Prevent unhandled rejection and add concurrent duplicate test

Middleware fix:
- Add void promise.catch() to suppress unhandled rejection warnings
- When we reject pending promises to unblock duplicates, there may be
  no waiters if the concurrent request already timed out or errored
- Without this, Node logs "UnhandledPromiseRejection" noise

Test coverage:
- Add "concurrent duplicate does not hang when first response is not cached"
- Verifies that 500 response correctly unblocks waiting duplicates
- Uses Promise.race with timeout to detect hangs
- First request returns 500 (not cached), second makes own request (200)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
